title: Decimals
blurb: Placeholder — understand place value and perform operations with decimals.

lessons.title: Introduction to Decimals
lessons.concreteComparison: Placeholder — real-world opener authored in Step 3. Example: $\$3.75$ means 3 dollars and 75 hundredths.
lessons.objective: Placeholder — read, write, and compare decimal numbers to the thousandths place.
concept: Placeholder concept paragraph. A decimal is another way to write a fraction with a denominator that is a power of 10.
